reforms.description: Congress enacted a bill encouraging the development of synthetic fuels from various sources, with a government Synthetic Fuels Corporation providing loan and price guarantees to stimulate production.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The development of synthetic fuels is expected to reduce dependency on traditional oil imports and foster innovation in energy production.
reforms.status_evidence: Congress enacted a bill encouraging the development of synthetic fuels.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift towards alternative energy sources, aiming to enhance energy security and stimulate innovation in the energy sector.
reforms.source_quote: Congress enacted a bill encouraging the development of synthetic fuels from coal liquids and gases, oil shale, biomass and unconventional gas in June.
